description: Searches for a contact and sends a text message. Uses focus_and_type (atomic click+clear+paste) to prevent double-typing when the vision system runs in parallel.

target.name: Search or start a new chat

steps.description: STATE CHECK: verify WhatsApp is logged in and showing the chat list (not QR login screen)
Dismiss any open chat/menu/overlay so we start from a clean state
Let the sidebar settle

target.name: Search or start a new chat

steps.description: ATOMically: click search bar → Ctrl+A → Delete → paste contact name. This prevents double-typing even if the vision system typed into the same field.
Wait for WhatsApp to filter and render search results
Select the top search result to open that chat
Wait for chat view to render and message input to appear
STATE CHECK: verify the chat actually opened (aborts if search had no matches)
ATOMically: click message input → clear → paste message text
Let the message register in the input
Send the message

description: Records and sends a voice message to the most recently opened chat.

steps.description: Hover/click the microphone icon to enter recording mode (turns into a red send button after first click)
Brief delay so the red record button is fully active
Click again to actually start recording (WhatsApp uses a two-stage click to prevent accidental sends)
Hold for the requested recording duration (converted to ms)
Stop and send the voice clip

description: Searches a contact and starts a voice call.

target.name: Search or start a new chat

steps.description: Focus the search bar
Type the contact's name
Open the top matching chat
Click the phone icon in the chat header to place a voice call

description: Opens a brand-new chat with a contact via the New Chat button.

steps.description: Open the New Chat panel from the side rail

target.name: Search contacts or start a new chat

steps.description: Focus the contact search field inside the New Chat panel
Type the contact name to filter the list
Select the top filtered result and open a fresh chat with them

description: Switches to the Status (Stories) tab and opens the most recent status update.

steps.description: Switch from Chats to the Status tab in the left nav rail
Brief delay for the status list to render
Open the most recent status update; WhatsApp auto-advances through subsequent updates

description: Searches for a specific song and plays the top result.

steps.description: Use Spotify's native shortcut to jump straight to the search bar
Type the requested song name
Submit the search query
Wait 1 second for search results to populate
Click the prominent Play button on the top search result

description: Skips to the next track using the native shortcut.

steps.description: Spotify's global next-track shortcut; works regardless of which view is focused

description: Returns to the previous track using the native shortcut.

steps.description: Spotify's previous-track shortcut

description: Creates a new empty playlist and names it.

steps.description: Spotify desktop shortcut to create a new playlist under the selected account
Wait for the playlist creation modal / inline rename field to appear
Type the new playlist name into the auto-focused rename field
Confirm the playlist name

description: Adds the currently playing track to Liked Songs using the heart toggle.

steps.description: Open the now-playing bottom bar context for keyboard focus
Tab through to the Save to Liked Songs button
Toggle the like (heart) on the current track

description: Sends a text message to the currently focused channel or DM.

steps.description: Ensure keyboard focus is moved away from any list onto the message input area
Type the message into the channel input box
Send the message (Discord sends on Enter by default)

description: Quick-joins the voice channel attached to the currently focused server via the server header button.

steps.description: Discord's hidden 'join voice channel for current server' shortcut on desktop (when focus is in a server)
Wait for the voice connection handshake to complete

description: Toggles self-mute on the current voice connection.

steps.description: Discord's global self-mute toggle; works whether or not the app is focused

description: Opens the Create Server wizard and names the new server.

steps.description: Click the green plus button at the bottom of the server list
Choose to start from scratch (no template)
Pick the casual server template option
Type the new server name into the focused text field
Submit the wizard and create the server

description: Opens the search bar and runs a text query in the current channel.

steps.description: Open Discord's quick-switcher (also nudges focus to the top search region)
Dismiss the quick-switcher; focus is now near the search bar
Focus the channel/server search bar
Type the search query (Discord auto-suggests filters)
Run the search and display the results panel

description: Opens a new tab and navigates to a specific URL.

steps.description: Open a fresh tab so we don't overwrite the user's current work
Type the URL directly into the automatically-focused address bar
Navigate to the site

description: Opens a new empty tab and focuses the address bar.

steps.description: Open a new tab; address bar is auto-focused and ready for typing

description: Closes the currently active tab.

steps.description: Chrome's close-current-tab shortcut; if it was the last tab, the window will close

description: Adds the current page to bookmarks using the star dialog.

steps.description: Open the Add Bookmark dialog with the page name pre-filled
Select all in the name field so we replace the default title
Type the user's chosen bookmark name
Confirm and save the bookmark to the bookmark bar

description: Opens a new Incognito window.

steps.description: Chrome's incognito window shortcut; opens a fresh private window in the foreground

description: Creates a new folder in the current directory and renames it.

steps.description: Explorer's native 'New Folder' shortcut; creates an inline-renamed folder
Type the new folder name (the default 'New folder' text is already selected)
Commit the folder name

description: Types a search query into the current folder's search box.

steps.description: Move keyboard focus to the folder's search bar in the top-right
Type the search query; Explorer filters results live
Commit the search (locks in the filtered view)

description: Copies the full path of the currently selected file to the clipboard.

steps.description: Open the Properties dialog for the selected file (path is in the Location field, but a faster route is below)
Close Properties without changes
Open the right-click context menu via keyboard for the selected file
Select 'Copy as path' from the context menu (Windows 11 highlights this accelerator)
Confirm 'Copy as path' so the full path lands on the clipboard

description: Toggles the 'Hidden items' option in the View ribbon/tab.

steps.description: Activate the View tab of the Explorer ribbon (Windows 10) / View menu (Windows 11)
Toggle the 'Hidden items' checkbox via its accelerator key

description: Jumps to the user's Downloads folder from anywhere in Explorer.

steps.description: Focus the address bar so we can type a path
Type the resolved path to the user's Downloads folder
Navigate to the Downloads folder

description: Opens the Bluetooth & devices page and toggles the Bluetooth master switch.

steps.description: Focus the Settings search bar at the top-left
Type the page name to filter the search results
Open the Bluetooth & devices page
Wait for the page to render the Bluetooth toggle
Tab through the page until the Bluetooth master toggle has focus
Toggle the Bluetooth switch (Space toggles a Toggle controlType in UIA)

description: Opens the System > Sound page and adjusts the master output volume.

steps.description: Focus the Settings search bar
Type 'Sound' to find the System > Sound page
Open the Sound settings page
Wait for the volume slider to render
Tab to the master Volume slider
Send the slider to 0% so we have a known starting point
Repeat Right-arrow presses to nudge the slider; engine should multiply by {{volume_percent}}
Type the target percentage directly into the slider's edit field (Windows 11 exposes a numeric input)
Commit the typed volume value

description: Opens the Display page and changes the built-in screen brightness.

steps.description: Focus the Settings search bar
Type 'Display' to find the Display settings page
Open the Display settings page
Wait for the brightness slider to render
Tab to the Brightness slider
Type the target brightness percentage into the slider's numeric edit field
Commit the new brightness value

description: Opens the Wi-Fi settings page so the user can pick a network.

steps.description: Focus the Settings search bar
Type 'Wi-Fi' (with hyphen) to match the page name exactly
Open the Wi-Fi settings page; the available networks list will be visible

description: Opens Windows Update and triggers a fresh check for updates.

steps.description: Focus the Settings search bar
Type 'Windows Update' to find the page directly
Open the Windows Update page
Wait for the page to render the Check for updates button
Tab to the 'Check for updates' button
Trigger the update check

description: Sends a text message to the currently focused channel or DM.

steps.description: Slack's 'jump to message input' shortcut; ensures focus is in the compose box regardless of current selection
Type the message into the compose box
Send the message (Slack sends on Enter by default; Shift+Enter is line break)

description: Opens the Set Status dialog and saves a custom status text.

steps.description: Slack's native 'Set Status' shortcut; opens the status picker modal directly
Wait for the modal's status text field to gain focus
Type the status text (Slack auto-suggests matching emojis)
Tab to the emoji picker field
Type the emoji name (e.g. 'coffee') to filter the picker
Select the top emoji result
Save and apply the status

description: Opens Slack's search bar and runs a query.

steps.description: Open Slack's quick-switcher (also a quick route to search focus)
Close the quick-switcher; focus is now in the top search region
Focus Slack's main search bar
Type the search query
Run the search and open the results pane

description: Starts a huddle (voice call) in the current channel or DM.

steps.description: Slack's native 'Start huddle' shortcut for the currently focused channel or DM
Wait for the huddle panel to appear and audio to connect

description: Opens a file by path using Quick Open.

steps.description: Open VS Code's Quick Open dialog (file fuzzy finder)
Type the file name or path fragment; Quick Open filters the workspace
Open the top match in the editor

description: Creates a new untitled file and saves it with a chosen name.

steps.description: Create a new untitled editor tab
Trigger Save; VS Code opens the Save As dialog because the file has no path yet
Type the desired file name into the focused Save As filename field
Confirm and save the file to disk

description: Formats the current document using the configured formatter.

steps.description: First half of the format-document chord shortcut
Second half of the format-document chord (Ctrl+K, Ctrl+F is format selection; for whole doc use Shift+Alt+F below)
Native 'Format Document' shortcut; runs the active formatter on the entire file

description: Toggles the integrated terminal panel visibility.

steps.description: VS Code's native toggle-terminal shortcut (backtick, requires Ctrl)

description: Opens project-wide Find in Files and runs a search.

steps.description: Open the Find in Files sidebar panel
Type the search query into the focused search input
Run the project-wide search; results populate the panel

description: Saves the current Notepad document with a chosen filename. Does NOT navigate to Documents (the default save location is already the user's Documents folder). Just types the filename and presses Enter.

steps.description: Trigger Save; opens Save As dialog for unsaved files
Wait for Save As dialog to fully render
STATE CHECK: verify Save As dialog is open (aborts if file was already saved and no dialog appeared)
Move focus to the filename input field (Win11 Notepad sometimes opens with file-type dropdown focused)
Let focus move to filename field
ATOMically: focus filename field → Ctrl+A → Delete → paste new filename. Replaces default 'Untitled.txt' entirely.
Let the filename register in the dialog
Press Save (Enter = default button = Save)

description: Opens the Find dialog and searches for a term.

steps.description: Open the Find dialog (legacy Notepad) / Find bar (Windows 11 Notepad)
Type the search term into the focused find field
Jump to the first match in the document

description: Opens Task Manager. (Note: the app-launch layer may pre-focus Task Manager; this workflow assumes it is already open and jumps to the Performance tab.)

steps.description: Cycle forward through the Task Manager top tabs
Cycle once more to reach the Performance tab (CPU/Memory/Disk/Network graphs)

description: Triggers a rectangular screen snip using the Snipping Tool's native shortcut.

steps.description: Start a new snip (Snipping Tool's native shortcut; screen dims for selection)
Brief delay so the dim overlay is fully active before the user (or a follow-up workflow) drags the selection rectangle

description: Composes and sends a new email in the Windows Mail app.

steps.description: Open a new email compose window
Wait for the compose window and its To: field to render
Type the recipient email address
Move focus to the Subject field
Type the email subject
Move focus to the body editor
Type the email body text
Mail app's Send shortcut; sends the email immediately

description: Creates a new calendar event in the Windows Calendar app.

steps.description: Open the New Event detail pane
Wait for the form fields to render
Type the event title (focus defaults to the title field)
Tab to the location field
Type the event location
Save the new event to the calendar

description: Switches the Photos app to the Collection (recent) view.

steps.description: Switch to the Collection tab where recent photos appear in reverse-chronological grid

description: Opens the Microsoft Store library and triggers an update check.

steps.description: Switch to the Library tab in the bottom-left nav
Wait for the Library page to render the Get Updates button
Trigger the Store's update check across all installed apps

description: Types a command into the active Terminal pane and runs it.

steps.description: Type the command directly into the focused terminal prompt (Terminal opens with the prompt focused)
Execute the command

description: Types an arithmetic expression into Calculator and shows the result.

steps.description: Type the expression (e.g. '12*8+4'); Calculator's Standard mode accepts numeric and operator keystrokes directly without focusing an Edit field
Compute and display the result (= key behavior)

description: Sends a chat message in the currently focused 1:1 or channel conversation.

steps.description: Teams' 'jump to compose' shortcut; ensures focus is in the message input box of the active conversation
Type the message text
Teams' native Send shortcut (also works as plain Enter in many contexts, but Ctrl+Enter is the documented accelerator)

description: Types a paragraph into Notepad and saves it as a .txt file in one workflow. Use this for the 'type me a paragraph then save it' use case.

steps.description: Click the document body to ensure focus is in the editing area
Let focus move to the document
Type the paragraph text via clipboard paste (preserve_existing=True so we don't clear the document first)
Let the text settle
Open the Save As dialog
Wait for Save As dialog to render
STATE CHECK: verify Save As dialog opened
Move focus to filename field
Let focus settle
Clear default filename + paste new filename
Let filename register
Save the file

description: Types a block of text into the currently open Notepad document. Uses preserve_existing=True so the document isn't cleared first. Use this BEFORE notepad_save_file.

steps.description: Click the document body to ensure focus is in the editing area
Let focus move to the document
Type the text via clipboard paste (preserve_existing=True so we don't Ctrl+A+Delete the document)
